message:
test(degradation,watchdog): add 62 integration tests for degradation and resize watchdog (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- degradation_edge_cases.rs: 37 tests covering full lifecycle cycles,
  cross-subsystem isolation, queued write edge cases, pattern/workflow
  management, snapshot ordering, report coherence, recovery attempt
  accumulation, DegradationLevel equality semantics, and serde roundtrips
- resize_watchdog_assessment_tests.rs: 25 tests covering severity
  classification (healthy/warning/critical/safe-mode), stalled transaction
  threshold boundary conditions, sample capping, warning line formatting,
  legacy fallback flag propagation, and serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
